title: cola macrantha
intro: Cola macrantha, also known as the yellow cola, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the bark and leaves, which contain alkaloids and have anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of cola macrantha include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Cola macrantha can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
